summary: Tested modular server refactor (server.py → database.py + auth.py + emails.py + routes.py), email notifications, admin password auto-update, leaderboard $nin fix, and email field in register modal. 13/13 backend tests passed. Frontend register modal shows EMAIL field with optional label and hint text correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: JWT_SECRET defaults to 'dev-secret' — ensure production .env sets this explicitly
CORS allow_origins defaults to '*' if env var missing — should enforce explicit origin in production
Resend email in test mode only delivers to verified addresses — log output confirms fire-and-forget tasks created but delivery not verified in test env
seed_data_creation: TEST_emailuser_* and TEST_uv_* users created during tests (test POI cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Modular server confirmed working. All 5 modules load without circular imports. Admin password auto-update logic exists in server.py startup. Leaderboard uses $nin (no duplicate key error). Register API accepts email field and persists it. GET /api/auth/me returns email. Upvote API: non-blocking, 3 upvotes → verified=True confirmed. Frontend register modal has EMAIL field with '(optional — for pin notifications)' label and hint text.
